name: Sysdig
description: Monitor Sysdig cloud security platform for container and cloud workload security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Sysdig
2. Go to Settings → User Profile
3. Copy your Sysdig API Token
4. Find your region URL from the Sysdig docs
5. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Sysdig → Settings → User Profile → Sysdig API Token

credentialFields.label: API URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Sysdig regional API URL. US East: https://us2.app.sysdig.com, US West: https://app.sysdigcloud.com, EU: https://eu1.app.sysdig.com

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Sysdig account is active for cloud security monitoring

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Sysdig alert policies are configured for cloud security events
